name: run_bash
description: Execute a shell command inside the sandboxed container. The sandbox has the workspace mounted, common build tools (python, node, git, pytest), and egress only to whitelisted hosts (LM Studio, SearXNG, Jina). Has a default 30s timeout. Requires human approval. Use this to run tests, install deps in the sandbox (NOT on host), or inspect runtime state.

command.description: Shell command. Will be executed as `/bin/bash -c <command>` inside the sandbox. Args are NOT shell-escaped — write a safe command.

working_directory.description: Optional workspace-relative directory. Defaults to workspace root.

timeout_seconds.description: Max execution time. Default and max enforced by backend.

stdout.description: May be truncated at backend-configured size.
